channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: World's largest aircraft carrier heads to Middle East as Iran nuclear tensions spike dramatically
item.description: USS Gerald R. Ford carrier strike group heads to Middle East as U.S.-Iran tensions escalate, joining USS Abraham Lincoln already deployed in region.

item.title: Watch: Maryland to 'Reap the Consequences' of Dem Governor Wes Moore's Political Stunt
Leavitt scoffs at reporter who questioned when Trump has been 'falsely called racist': 'You're kidding?'
item.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt vows to provide "receipts" after a reporter questions whether President Donald Trump was "falsely called ...

item.title: Trump worries Potomac âwill still stinkâ during America250 celebration after massive sewage spill
item.description: President Donald Trump blames Maryland Governor Wes Moore for Potomac River sewage disaster, claims incompetence led to the millions of gallons to spi...

item.title: Watch: International Coalition Pledges $5B+ for Gaza Peace Efforts
JD Vance Drops Serious Reality Check on U.S.-Born Olympian Competing for China
Backfire - DHS Shutdown Now Halts ICE Oversight
Louisiana GOP lawmaker urges FEMA aid for 'hurricane' like ice storm as DHS shutdown drags on
item.description: Rep. Julia Letlow is seeking federal emergency aid for northern Louisiana in the ice storm recovery efforts addressing widespread power outages.

item.title: Red, White, and Blue: Air Force One to Get First New Paint Design Since Kennedy Era
Rubio announces designation for Nicaraguan prison official tied to alleged human rights violations
item.description: U.S. designates Nicaragua prison director Roberto Clemente Guevara GÃ³mez as Secretary of State Marco Rubio demands release of political prisoners.
